name: kiki
notes: Profile for the 'kiki' trained model. These are the model creator's INTENDED inference settings, recovered from the original RVC tool kiki shipped with (mod/configs/config.json): pitch=+12 (kiki is a female model meant to be driven with the input transposed up an octave -- this is THE fix for the 'weird/电音' quality at pitch 0), index_rate=0.0, f0=fcpe (we use rmvpe; infer_rvc_python's fcpe path is broken). The creator used rms_mix_rate=0.5 (imposes source loudness for live dynamics); we keep 1.0 (faithful, model's own loudness) -- set 0.5 if you prefer the creator's exact live feel. pitch is voice-dependent: override per-run with --pitch. Paths are relative to the project root.
